variant_name: 昭昭 — 三岁聪慧启蒙期
trigger: 江南三年蒙太奇中，昭昭已经成长到三岁左右，伴随书房、庭院、读本、典籍与来往书信出现，体现聪慧成长。

appearance_delta.face: 目光更明亮有神，带明显机灵感，表情活泼而专注
appearance_delta.body: 幼小但更结实灵活，能跑能跳，也能安静坐在书房接触读本
appearance_delta.hair: 软黑发梳成更完整的小髻，发饰比婴儿期与初到江南时更精致
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 早慧感增强，既有童真又透出贵气与教养

costume_override.outfit: 精致小夹袄、小裙或便于活动的幼女襦裙，搭配珠花或红绳发饰，适合书房识字与庭院玩耍

visual_reference: smart ancient chinese little girl aged about three, bright lively eyes, fair skin, soft black hair in small twin buns with delicate bead ornaments, colorful refined hanfu for a noble child, holding a beginner reading book or near letters and scrolls in a Jiangnan study, clever and cheerful, realistic cinematic style, elegant domestic atmosphere, soft daylight
